spec: A single top-level gateway (index.html) is discoverable + operable by humans and agents: it carries a JSON-LD substrate manifest, self-addresses by content, and boots the OS (κ SW + rEFInd→Plymouth→SDDM→PrimeOS) on a dumb static host — 100% serverless

results.name: the gateway carries an agent manifest (JSON-LD: SoftwareApplication · Boot action · endpoints)
agent-discovery files resolve (llms.txt + /.well-known/agents.json at the root)
staged layout: gateway at /, OS as the os/ subtree, served by a dumb host
opening the gateway renders the boot window (mark · title · enter · live self-κ · agent links)
the gateway boots → the Plymouth splash (κ SW controls, F2 → Boot Menu prompt, isolated)
